title: eragrostis gloeophylla
intro: Eragrostis gloeophylla, also known as the hairy love grass or hairy grass, is a species of grass native to Australia. It is used in traditional medicine due to its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial effects. The health benefits of Eragrostis gloeophylla include reducing inflammation and treating wounds, as well as providing relief from fever and respiratory issues. Herbal preparations of Eragrostis gloeophylla include infusions, tinctures, and extracts that can be used to treat various health conditions.
